title: pelargonium × stephanianum
intro: Pelargonium × stephanianum, also known as the Stephan's Pelargonium or Rose-scented Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant is native to South Africa and has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium × stephanianum include alleviating digestive issues, relieving stress and anxiety, and supporting immune function, among others. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used internally or applied topically to reap its benefits.
